name: Deconstruct Trajectory
description: Expand a JointTrajectory into per-point Configurations and (optionally) RobotCellStates ready to feed VisualizeRobotCell, plus DataTrees of velocities/accelerations/efforts for plotting the trajectory profile. Pair `cell_states` with a Stream Filter / Index slider to scrub through frames.

inputParameters.name: trajectory
inputParameters.description: A JointTrajectory (typically the output of PlanMotion or PlanCartesianMotion).

inputParameters.name: start_state
inputParameters.description: Optional RobotCellState used as the template for each per-point state. If unwired, the `cell_states` output is empty (only `configurations` is populated).

outputParameters.name: configurations
outputParameters.description: One Configuration per trajectory point, in order.

outputParameters.name: cell_states
outputParameters.description: One RobotCellState per trajectory point: a copy of `start_state` with `robot_configuration` set to the corresponding point. Empty when `start_state` is unwired.

outputParameters.name: velocities
outputParameters.description: DataTree of joint velocities — one branch per trajectory point, each branch ordered to match the trajectory's `joint_names`. Zeros when the backend didn't populate this field.

outputParameters.name: accelerations
outputParameters.description: DataTree of joint accelerations — one branch per trajectory point, ordered to match `joint_names`. Zeros when the backend didn't populate this field.

outputParameters.name: efforts
outputParameters.description: DataTree of joint efforts — one branch per trajectory point, ordered to match `joint_names`. Zeros when the backend didn't populate this field.
